/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_first_pkg_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmy_first_pkg_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/my_first_pkg_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/my_first_pkg_interfaces/msg/my_data__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/luscifer/ros2_ws/build/my_first_pkg_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libmy_first_pkg_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
